cyberware_catalog.name: Phantom Limbs
cyberware_catalog.description: Extra set of controllable robotic arms (basic tasks).

cyberware_catalog.name: Cyberarm (Dexterous)
cyberware_catalog.description: Precision tool use. RP lockpicking, surgery, mechanical hacking.

cyberware_catalog.name: GorillaArms
cyberware_catalog.description: Lift heavy shit. Overpower people. Physical domination. +50% strength

cyberware_catalog.name: Monowire
cyberware_catalog.description: A hyper-thin, retractable filament—stronger than steel, sharper than a scalpel.

cyberware_catalog.name: Mantis Blades
cyberware_catalog.description: Mantis Blades. sharp. scary. neato-o.

cyberware_catalog.name: Enhanced Ears
cyberware_catalog.description: Higher chance to Hear whispers through walls, filter sound, pinpoint origin.

cyberware_catalog.name: Noise Dampener
cyberware_catalog.description: Higher chance to filter out harmful sonic frequencies.

cyberware_catalog.name: Cyberlungs
cyberware_catalog.description: Breathe underwater, through smoke, gas, or vacuum.

cyberware_catalog.name: Oxygen Recycler
cyberware_catalog.description: Prolonged breath-holding. (2 minutes)

cyberware_catalog.name: Chemical Analyzer
cyberware_catalog.description: Higher chance to detect chemical traces in the air.

cyberware_catalog.name: Detoxifier
cyberware_catalog.description: Higher chance to filters toxins from blood effectively.

cyberware_catalog.name: Shock Palms
cyberware_catalog.description: Delivers mild electrical shock on contact.

cyberware_catalog.name: CryoGrip
cyberware_catalog.description: Emit cold from hands, enough to freeze certain surfaces touched or cause frostbite if applied for too long.

cyberware_catalog.name: SilentStep Soles
cyberware_catalog.description: Shock-dampening foot mod. Complete silence when walking.

cyberware_catalog.name: Micro-Vibration Generator
cyberware_catalog.description: Enhanced bladed melee effectiveness via vibration. +50% Effectiveness

cyberware_catalog.name: Cyberfingers
cyberware_catalog.description: Hidden tools in fingertips—USB, lockpick, small blade.

cyberware_catalog.name: Cybernetic Claws
cyberware_catalog.description: Claws or stylized tools. Intimidation, fashion, or utility.

cyberware_catalog.name: Subdermal Grip
cyberware_catalog.description: Lets you hold objects tighter than human limits—great for weapons or grappling.

cyberware_catalog.name: Dermal Plating
cyberware_catalog.description: Resistant to blades, blunt trauma, Rifle Caliber (7.62 and below)

cyberware_catalog.name: Sub-dermal Plating
cyberware_catalog.description: Resistant to blades, blunt trauma, Pistol Caliber

cyberware_catalog.name: NanoStitch Skin
cyberware_catalog.description: Automatically seals minor wounds such as small knife wound.

cyberware_catalog.name: Supra-Dermal Weave
cyberware_catalog.description: Reinforced skin, minor resistance to injuries.

cyberware_catalog.name: Optical Camo
cyberware_catalog.description: Semi-Invisible when activated (50%)

cyberware_catalog.name: Chameleon Skin
cyberware_catalog.description: Passive invisibility from further than 5ft when still.

cyberware_catalog.name: Pressure Sensor Skin
cyberware_catalog.description: Senses air pressure changes—better at weather prediction, higher chance for detecting hidden compartments.

cyberware_catalog.name: Luminescent Skin
cyberware_catalog.description: Emit gentle illumination in darkness. You ARE the flashlight.

cyberware_catalog.name: Thermal Control Skin
cyberware_catalog.description: Adjust body temperature at will.  80°F to 130°F (Cool to the touch to hot enough to feel unpleasant, burn with prolonged contact)

cyberware_catalog.name: Subdermal Display
cyberware_catalog.description: Project images or text from your body—RP IDs, tattoos.

cyberware_catalog.name: UnderSkin Lightshow
cyberware_catalog.description: Create glowing patterns or tattoos beneath skin.

cyberware_catalog.name: Cyberleg (Runner)
cyberware_catalog.description: Jump farther, run faster, land silently. Parkour beast.

cyberware_catalog.name: Reinforced Tendons
cyberware_catalog.description: No fall damage from < 20 feet, Reduced fall damage from < 30 feet.

cyberware_catalog.name: DollChip
cyberware_catalog.description: Hardware-bonded collar with encrypted owner ID. Can be issued commands by chip owner. Does not remember anything in-session

cyberware_catalog.name: Spasm Drone Port
cyberware_catalog.description: 3 Charges - Releases a tiny scout drone or flying camera.

cyberware_catalog.name: Enhanced Tastebuds
cyberware_catalog.description: Taste chemical compositions—higher chance to detect poisons, substances.

cyberware_catalog.name: ICE Layer
cyberware_catalog.description: Detects incoming hacks instantly—early warning.

cyberware_catalog.name: GhostTag
cyberware_catalog.description: Your face is automatically blurred in security cameras. Higher chance to be unidentifiable in camera footage.

cyberware_catalog.name: Biomonitor
cyberware_catalog.description: Tracks all vital signs. Can auto-alert partners when you're in danger.

cyberware_catalog.name: Internal Storage
cyberware_catalog.description: Stash a weapon, chip, or vial inside your body.

cyberware_catalog.name: Modded Mandibles
cyberware_catalog.description: Jaw opens wider than normal—voice amp, bite attack, or freak people out.

cyberware_catalog.name: SmartLink
cyberware_catalog.description: Allows the use of Smart Weapons, which benefit from targeting assistance, auto-aim correction, and firing arc predictions via your HUD. Without this cyberware, Smart Weapons function like normal guns.

cyberware_catalog.name: Mr. Studd™ / Midnight Lady™
cyberware_catalog.description: Boosted stamina, modular sensations, vibe modules.

cyberware_catalog.name: Scent Scanner
cyberware_catalog.description: Track people or chemicals by smell. Smell blood, oil, etc.

cyberware_catalog.name: Tail Mount
cyberware_catalog.description: Prehensile tail–style, weapon, or utility limb.

cyberware_catalog.name: VoiceWeaver
cyberware_catalog.description: Real-time voice modulation—change pitch, mimic accents, disguise yourself.

cyberware_catalog.name: Netrunner Suite (Level 3)
cyberware_catalog.description: Full cyberwarfare, backdoor exploitation.

cyberware_catalog.name: Netrunner Suite (Level 2)
cyberware_catalog.description: Quickhacks, control systems.

cyberware_catalog.name: Memory Bank
cyberware_catalog.description: Store perfect audio/visual recall.

cyberware_catalog.name: Impulse Splicer
cyberware_catalog.description: Cuts the delay between thought and action. You do what you think—no second-guessing.

cyberware_catalog.name: Neurofilter
cyberware_catalog.description: Suppresses emotions. Perfect in combat, negotiations, torture.

cyberware_catalog.name: Netrunner Suite (Level 1)
cyberware_catalog.description: Basic Net access. Ability to quickhack. Comes with Interface Jack to connect to Terminals/Vechicles/etc.

cyberware_catalog.name: SmartEyes
cyberware_catalog.description: Zoom, thermal, night vision, facial ID, AR HUD.

cyberware_catalog.name: Targeting Optic
cyberware_catalog.description: Motion tracking and target prediction

cyberware_catalog.name: Retinal Projector
cyberware_catalog.description: Project images directly onto surfaces from eyes. (You can place stickers)

cyberware_catalog.name: FlashVisor
cyberware_catalog.description: Auto-adjusts to sudden flashes, light blasts, laser dazzlers. Lower chance of being blinded.

cyberware_catalog.name: Combat Wired Reflexes
cyberware_catalog.description: Always-on reflex boost for high-performance combat. Its very hard to sneak up on you, you are fast and react almost instantly

cyberware_catalog.name: NeoFiber
cyberware_catalog.description: Synthetic muscle fibers for increased strength. 30% strength gain, Can be applied to 2 out of three: Legs, Arms, Tails

cyberware_catalog.name: Dense Marrow
cyberware_catalog.description: Increases body weight and striking power. 20% Heavier.

cyberware_catalog.name: Recoil Dampeners
cyberware_catalog.description: Absorbs recoil for stable firing. Absolute stability for small arms, less as the caliber increases.

cyberware_catalog.name: Reactive Muscle Fibers
cyberware_catalog.description: Short bursts of heightened strength. (e.g, a Single punch at +50% power)

ticket_index.title: 📝 Audit Log
ticket_index.body:
📝 audit log user medusa_cascade (286338318076084226) action 🗑️ deleted dm relay: after about an hour, claire returns, sliding back to your side of the bar and leaning in comfortably. she tosses down a small note scribbled with three names, glancing around once more before speaking quietly.

"alright, raven—got three netrunners who might bite on your offer:"

* **tengu** (slaya) – "fast, sharp, good instincts. bit of a wildcard, but gets the job done."
* **eclipse** (freebooze) – "reliable and discrete, careful enough to keep her head low. probably your safest bet if you're worried about being traced."
* **ty** (boobaspice) – "clever as hell with encryption, but bold. likes to push limits, so could be your ticket to the deepest data—or trouble."

claire taps the note, giving you a small, knowing smile. "your choice, choom. let me know which way you're leaning, and i'll set up the meet."

ncrp is a **social-driven rp setting**. your character doesn’t need to be a badass solo or corpo exec to matter. what we care about is:
- characters with **depth**, flaws, and strong personalities  
- hooks that allow **other players and fixers** to interact with you  
- backstories that are **grounded in cyberpunk tone and tech**  
- chrome and enhancements that come with **costs**—mental, physical, or social

- **please remember**: your choices in character have consequences. 
- for example: if you choose to be an corpo exec, you likely won't be hired as a merc, and may be mistrusted in general. 

**characters evolve over time but that evolution takes time. you need to convince others *in character* that you've changed.**

if you only have a rough idea, that’s totally okay!  
just open a ticket and we’ll help you flesh it out.

for any tc activity in his free time.

**message edited in <#1469447056690123005>** [jump to message](https://discordapp.com/channels/1348601552083882108/1469447056690123005/1469457950861955165) before we want to take a moment to address why there are often a lot of questions and clarifications during the character creation process.

first and foremost, ncrp (night city roleplay) is a character-driven roleplay. the reason we ask so many questions during character creation is to ensure that your character is fully written out, clearly explained, and grounded within the setting. it gives you solid material to call back on during scenes, character growth, and long-term arcs.
having this information written out helps keep everything within canon and ensures consistency across the server. it protects both the player and the setting, and it allows stories to remain congruent as they develop over time.

we also want to remind everyone that the entire staff and event writing team does this work voluntarily. we all have lives outside of the server, and the majority of the team is us-based. because of this, tickets created very late at night for us can occasionally go unseen for a short time. ... after we want to take a moment to address why there are often a lot of questions and clarifications during the character creation process.

we also want to remind everyone that the entire staff and event writing team does this work voluntarily. we all have lives outside of the server, and the majority of the team is us-based. because of this, tickets created very late at night for us can occasionally go unseen for a short time. this is never intentio... user id: 282007655218937867 freebooze 1469447056690123005

## a) guns catalog sheet (wiki-style)
* the guns sheet is a catalog of what could be available in ncrp (like reading a wiki).
* it does not mean an item is currently stocked anywhere.
* to buy something, you must find a seller (gun store / fixer) who carries it or who can special order it.
* players submit custom requests (i.e. prefabs they want to use) via ticket. then buy it as a special order from gunstore

## b) access tiers
 **common**
access: cash only, normal shelf items. 
* basic pistols + revolvers (power/standard), smg, ars, shotguns

**controlled**
access: cash + you must be on that seller’s “cleared for controlled weapons” list (rep/vouch-based).
* smart weapons (anything that needs a smartlink / guided rounds)
* tech weapons (charge-up, penetration, high-end internals)
* emp / specialty / utility weapons (anything “tactical”)
* “milspec-ish” stuff that’s believable but not full heavy-weapon tier

**restricted**
access:  cash + cleared list... after # 1) changes to guns (buyer side)

**message edited in <#1348603380821528626>** [jump to message](https://discordapp.com/channels/1348601552083882108/1348603380821528626/1379932370865492048) before # 📌 **read first – pc & npc character creation guidelines**
ncrp is a **social-driven rp setting**. your character doesn’t need to be a badass solo or corpo exec to matter. what we care about is:
- characters with **depth**, flaws, and strong personalities  
- hooks that allow **other players and fixers** to interact with you  
- backstories that are **grounded in cyberpunk tone and tech**  
- chrome and enhancements that come with **costs**—mental, physical, or social
- __**if its not in your character sheet, it doesn't exist!**__

- **please remember**: your choices in character have consequences. 
- for example: if you choose to be an corpo exec, you likely won't be hired as a merc, and may be mistrusted in general. 

**characters evolve over time but that evolution takes time. you need to convince others *in character* that you've changed.**

if you only have a rough idea, that’s totally okay!  
just open a ticket and we’ll hel.
---

**message edited in <#1469834591991894056>** [jump to message](https://discordapp.com/channels/1348601552083882108/1469834591991894056/1476650798321631395) before <#1476192349393518674> 

the main issue with this ticket isn't what they're attempting.  the issue here is they're delving into some deep seeded stuff that can potentially dictate how the entirety of ncrp's lore going forwards.

most of what they're mentioning in their document is founded upon conspiracies and in some cases actual old lore of the table top.  

it's a really cool idea, but this comes across less as character hooks and more like a table top campaign arc.  one that doesn't have a fixer behind it.

so you've got 3 characters tied to a conspiracy with no one to push their narrative on the fixer side of things.

the rest is just detail, you get too stuck in the weeds on this and you'll just frustrate them to the point that they'll just walk away, likely from ncrp entirely. after <#1476192349393518674>

most of what they're mentioning in their document is founded upon conspiracies and in some cases actual old lore of the table top.  

it's a really cool idea, but this comes across less as character hooks and more like a table top campaign arc.  one that doesn't have a fixer behind it.

so you've got 3 characters tied to a conspiracy with no one to push their narrative on the fixer side of things.

the rest is just detail, you get too stuck in the weeds on this and you'll just frustrate them to the point that they'll just walk away, likely from ncrp entirely. user id: 122199279447048192 phoolery 1469834591991894056 1476192349393518674 1476192349393518674

ticket_index.title: (embed)
ticket_index.body:
**message edited in <#1476192349393518674>** [jump to message](https://discordapp.com/channels/1348601552083882108/1476192349393518674/1476657444875927794) before ok, so, i sense some rising tensions in this ticket, so allow me to cut more to an issue that i see from a story telling side of things.

first off, allow me to say as an old head of the 20xx setting, some good research has been done here.  y'all are delving into one of the major conspiracies that's haunted this setting for a long ass time.  if y'all were using this as a foundation for a cyberpunk red campaign, i would be all over this as a player, hell if this was a campaign module i'd run it for some players as a ref.  this is a really cool story thread.

i could honestly care less about the grounded-ness of the experiments, or the reasoning behind it all, as this is a science fiction universe with tech that is beyond the realms of possibility.  we tend to get stuck into shoring up all the loose ends in character creation so that people can't pull surprises out of their hats down the road.  

however, this isn't really a character creation ticket, this is more so a plotline ticket.

ticket_index.body:
**message edited in <#1348603380821528626>** [jump to message](https://discordapp.com/channels/1348601552083882108/1348603380821528626/1379932370865492048) before # 📌 **read first – pc & npc character creation guidelines**
ncrp is a **social-driven rp setting**. your character doesn’t need to be a badass solo or corpo exec to matter. what we care about is:
- characters with **depth**, flaws, and strong personalities  
- hooks that allow **other players and fixers** to interact with you  
- backstories that are **grounded in cyberpunk tone and tech**  
- chrome and enhancements that come with **costs**—mental, physical, or social
- __**if its not in your character sheet, it doesn't exist!**__

- **please remember**: your choices in character have consequences. 
- for example: if you choose to be an corpo exec, you likely won't be hired as a merc, and may be mistrusted in general. 

**characters evolve over time but that evolution takes time. you need to convince others *in character* that you've changed.**

if you only have a rough idea, that’s totally okay!  
just open a ticket and we’ll hel.
---

lead fixer

the lead fixer would focus on the operational side of the fixer team. this role would be responsible for things like:

* making sure new fixers are onboarded in a reasonable timeframe

* keeping track of fixer activity, responsiveness, and follow-through
* helping make sure orgs, story owners, and events are actually being maintained
* identifying when something is falling through the cracks from a staffing or process standpoint
* helping keep fixer admin organized and escalating larger concerns when needed

lead writer

# new character pause and price adjustments annoucement
## __**new character pause**__

we are implementing a pause to new characters. this mean you have until <t:1776625200:f> to submit new characters. after that we will not accept new characters.

this will not be permanent but will likely be around a month. this is to give a chance for us to catch up on existing character tickets and give our new fixers time to get their feet under them. we will announce when we open again.
## __**cyberware and gun prices**__
we have reduced prices on cyberware and guns by 50% in most cases. this should make them a lot more accessible. this does not remove other restrictions on cyberware and guns. keep in mind that vendors may charge more money than this ic.

also please update your weapons to use the new color system that you can see on the cyberware list

## ❓**q: what the hell is cyberpunk? i don't know this setting at all!**

### a: thats totally fine! check out our guide here: [night city intro](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ghwrh0lz4-psgr1s3_seyghcx7ki4i3zsuomisckutu/edit?usp=sharing)

---

## ❓**can i use a public avatar?**

### a: yes

---

## ❓**q: pc or quest?**

### a: pc only.

---

## ❓**q: how do i join the rp?**

### a: there are 3 steps

1. join the group: https://vrchat.com/home/group/grp_667e7e40-7ea9-4142-a81e-5939c18c990f/
2. verify in this discord via <#1351049157875339274> 
3. put your name in <#1382703020332290089> 

that will give you the group role to join group instances.

---

## ❓**q: how do i make a character?**

### a: start by checking out the <#1348603380821528626>  channel. read the restrictions and review the character sheet template.

then, click the button in the channel to open a character ticket. submit your sheet there along with photos of the avatar y... after # 📖 **faq – frequently asked questions**

im changing it so then he never went fully into arasaka and went the tyger claw route. since hes only been in one session no one knows of this character.
